TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Posko, title = Posko, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Posko} }

S.FORM: alang Posko ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 148 buwan, 378 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 42% kyan ku 159 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 58% kyan ku 219 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 33%, Bunun 5%, Truku 1%, Setik 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Posko hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Posko hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Posko hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Posko hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Posko hya' ga Cinemnemay. tay 'llaw na Posko hya' ga Afih. tay 'zil na Posko hya' ga Cilakesay. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Posko ga unagt kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Posko ga unagt pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Posko ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 148 buwan, 378 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 42% kyan ku 159 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 58% kyan ku 219 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 33%, Bunun 5%, Truku 1%, Setik 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Posko hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Posko hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Posko hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Posko hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Posko hya' ga Cinemnemay. tay 'llaw na Posko hya' ga Afih. tay 'zil na Posko hya' ga Cilakesay. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Posko ga unagt kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Posko ga unagt pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pos~ɕko ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βuri ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, truku *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pos~ɕko ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na pos~ɕko ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na pos~ɕko ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pos~ɕko ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pos~ɕko ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨinemnemaj. taj ʔllaw na pos~ɕko ħjaʔ ɣa a*iħ. taj ʔzil na pos~ɕko ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ pos~ɕko ɣa unaɣt kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ pos~ɕko ɣa unaɣt pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
